author: jtraglia
content: Hey CL devs, we just published the [v1.7.0-alpha.4](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/releases/tag/v1.7.0-alpha.4) specs. This release contains several notable changes: (1) For Phase0, there are executable gossip message validation specifications for Phase0 topics; note that this defines a new test format. (2) For Fulu, there are specifications for the optional _cell level dissemination_ feature. 3) For Gloas, there is a new `ptc_window` field in the state which contains PTC assignments for the previous, current, and next epochs. (4) For Gloas, proposer preferences are now accepted in the previous epoch _and_ current epoch of the proposal. cc <@&1417820113981145228>
